title: To designate the Washington Dulles International Airport in Virginia as the "Donald J. Trump International Airport".
plain_summary: This bill would change the name of Washington Dulles International Airport in Virginia. The airport would be renamed to Donald J. Trump International Airport. After the name change, all government papers and documents would have to use the new name instead of the old one.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Aviation.

sections.title: Section 1  Designation of Donald J. Trump International Airport
sections.text: The Washington Dulles International Airport in Virginia will be renamed the Donald J. Trump International Airport. This new name takes effect after this law is passed. Any time a federal law, rule, map, document, or other official record mentions the Washington Dulles International Airport, it will now be considered to mean the Donald J. Trump International Airport.
